subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses unto a people who recognize that there is none other God but Him. His is the creation and the command, and all return unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی نزل الایات لقوم یعرفون انه ما من اله الا هو له الخلق و الامر و کل الیه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
